reforms.description: A range of direct measures has been implemented to encourage investment and the creation of new businesses, particularly small and medium-sized enterprises, through subsidies and favorable financial conditions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging investment and business creation supports economic growth and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures have been put into action to support new business creation.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change aimed at fostering entrepreneurship.
reforms.source_quote: Another feature of industrial policy has been a vast array of measures aimed at fostering investment and the creation of new businesses, in particular small and medium-sized enterprises.

reforms.description: The government proposed to increase private sector development opportunities, especially in satellite and mobile communications, allowing them to offer voice links, in response to business pressure.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing private sector capabilities in communications can lead to innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has proposed the initiative in response to business pressure.
reforms.importance_rationale: The proposal represents a significant but narrower change aimed at enhancing private sector capabilities.
reforms.source_quote: The government has now proposed (March 1991) to increase private sector development opportunities, especially in the area of satellite and mobile communications.

reforms.description: A wide-ranging requalification programme was launched by the Federal Labour Office with a goal to have 550,000 persons entering retraining programmes during 1991, with a budget of DM 6.7 billion.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Retraining the workforce enhances skills and employability, contributing to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been launched and is actively retraining individuals.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme is significant in scale and aims to improve workforce skills.
reforms.source_quote: The Federal Labour Office launched a wide-ranging requalification programme with a goal to have a total of 550,000 persons entering retraining programmes during 1991.
